title: Fertilizer producer Mosaic says demand strong, but stock falls on Q4 earnings miss
text: Shares of Mosaic Co. MOS, -1.80% dropped more than 6% in the extended session Tuesday after the fertilizer and feed producer missed fourth-quarter expectations and said rising agricultural commodity prices will be good for demand for its products this year. Mosaic said it earned $665 million, or $1.76 a share, in the quarter, compared with $828 million, or $2.17 a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: Mosaic Company: Starting To Look Ripe For The Picking
text: Fertilizer prices have risen greatly due to strong demand and supply restraints. Watch China and Belarus, they have the potential to change the market entirely. MOS needs high fertilizer prices to succeed, prices are due to correct in 2022. Investors can expect double digit gains this year but should be ready to exit in the second half.
